title: U.S. Troops, Seriously Wounded in Recent Strikes, Were Flown to Germany for Help
summary_full: The seriously wounded service members are among the roughly 100 American troops that the Defense Department recently said were injured by Iranian attacks since early July.
summary_public: The seriously wounded service members are among the roughly 100 American troops that the Defense Department recently said were injured by Iranian attacks since early July.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: injured by Iranian attacks since early July
